name: Autoregia PAIS Focus Bridge
description: Exposes the focused window (application + title) over the session D-Bus for the PAIS interaction collector. Owned by PAIS itself, so it is not subject to the org.gnome.Shell.Introspect access restrictions. On modern GNOME (GTK4) AT-SPI does not publish app windows, so this extension is the only reliable focus source.
